action.reasoning: Observation: flip TTA improved Quickdraw accuracy from 0.1589 to 0.1613 without retraining, giving a new best. Analysis: we are already close to the expected ceiling for plain ResNet ERM, so further gains likely require a stronger backbone or a more target-aligned objective rather than small inference tweaks. Given remaining time/iterations, the best next exploration is a stronger pretrained backbone with good DG transfer. DINOv2 ViT-B/14 is a strong OOD feature extractor and available offline; a short pilot run can test whether it beats ResNet quickly. Decision: add a DINOv2-based classifier option with backward-compatible predict/validate loading, run a short 2-epoch pilot training to measure runtime and source-val, then decide whether to scale and submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --backbone dinov2 --epochs 2 --batch_size 96 --eval_batch_size 128 --num_workers 12 --lr 1e-4 --weight_decay 5e-5 --dropout 0.1 --mixup_alpha 0.1 --freeze_backbone_epochs 1 --output_dir checkpoints/dinov2_pilot && python validate.py --checkpoint checkpoints/dinov2_pilot/best.pt --tta_mode none && python validate.py --checkpoint checkpoints/dinov2_pilot/best.pt --tta_mode flip
